name: Lime Lemonade
recipeInstructions:
1. In each of 2 glasses, combine 2 tablespoons water and 2 tablespoons lemonade mix; stir well.
2. Gently stir in 1 cup chilled lime sparkling water into each glass.
3. Add ice to each glass and squeeze the juice from 1 lime wedge into each glass.
4. Serves: 2 (1 cup) servings.
